ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was published */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company mentioned in the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Summary or main content of the article */,
  "raw_text" TEXT /* Raw text of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "src_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article as determined by the source */,
  "raw_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source where the article was published */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the article (0 for neutral, 1 for positive, -1 for negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article is inserted into the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article is updated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_name FOREIGN KEY ("source_name") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's sector */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's industry */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date when the company went public */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the news source (0-1) */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score of the news source (0-1) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the news source (e.g., news website, blog, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "favorite_companies" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favorite company symbols */,
  "alert_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of alert preferences (e.g., stock movements, earnings reports) */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's email is verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_favorite_companies FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_companies") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the earnings report (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the earnings report */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the earnings were reported */,
  "eps_actual" REAL /* Actual earnings per share */,
  "eps_estimate" REAL /* Estimated earnings per share */,
  "revenue_actual" REAL /* Actual revenue */,
  "revenue_estimate" REAL /* Estimated revenue */,
  "surprise_percent" REAL /* Percentage surprise of the earnings report */,
  "forecasted_eps" REAL /* Forecasted earnings per share for the next quarter */,
  "forecasted_revenue" REAL /* Forecasted revenue for the next quarter */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the company's earnings or revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., stock movement, earnings report) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert (e.g., stock price, EPS) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert is created */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert is sent to the user */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user reads the alert */,
  "acknowledged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user acknowledges the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Score indicating the positivity of the article (0-1) */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Score indicating the negativity of the article (0-1) */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Score indicating the neutrality of the article (0-1) */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound score combining all sentiment scores */,
  "entity_recognition" TEXT /* Results of entity recognition analysis (e.g., named entities, keywords) */,
  "topic_modeling" TEXT /* Results of topic modeling analysis (e.g., topic distributions) */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the sentiment score over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_sentiments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)
